metadata.task_title: Add a song to a playlist
metadata.instruction: Create the playlist "Fun with Kids" on Media Player and add Task ID 76.mp3 in Documents > Task 76 folder to the playlist.
metadata.context: I want to make a new playlist to organize my music better. I want to add "Baby Shark" video in my playlist.

l3.rationale: Tab/Shift+Tab moves focus to the next or previous button.

l4.rationale: The user cycles focus and uses keyboard shortcuts/menus in Media Player to reach the file-open workflow needed for the task.

l5.rationale: This span is entirely application navigation through menus, buttons, and dialogs to reach the playlist workflow before any text entry begins.
